items.title: OpenAI finds roughly 30 percent of popular AI coding test is broken
items.summary: OpenAI reviewed SWE-Bench Pro, a widely used test for measuring AI models' programming skills, and found roughly 30 percent of its tasks are broken. The company is pulling its earlier endorsement of the benchmark. The article OpenAI finds roughly 30 percent of popular AI coding t

items.title: Databricks makes Chinese open-source model GLM 5.2 its default coding engine after it matched Opus at lower cost
items.summary: Databricks benchmarked coding agents on its own multi-million-line codebase and found that the Chinese open-source model GLM 5.2 matched Anthropic's Opus 4.8 at $1.28 per task versus $1.94. The company plans to roll it out as a daily coding workhorse. Its broader takeaway: no sin

items.title: OpenAI's AI beats every human at AtCoder, a top competitive programming contest
items.summary: At the AtCoder World Tour Finals 2026, an OpenAI system crushed all human competitors in an exhibition match, solving all five problems in the Algorithm Division. Two of those problems were rated exceptionally difficult by observers. The article OpenAI's AI beats every human at A

items.title: Grok 4.5 is so cheap compared to Fable 5 and GPT 5.5 that benchmark gaps may not matter much
items.summary: xAI releases Grok 4.5, trained on tens of thousands of Nvidia GB300 GPUs. In coding benchmarks, the model trails Fable 5 and GPT-5.5 but needs 4.2 times fewer tokens than Opus 4.8. At $2 per million input tokens, it costs a fraction of the competition. EU availability is expected

items.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
items.summary: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

items.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
items.summary: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

items.title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
items.summary: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

items.title: Chinese AI startup MiniMax plans to open-source a 2.7 trillion parameter model later this year

items.title: ChatGPT can now listen and talk at the same time, making AI conversations seem more human
items.summary: OpenAI's GPT-Live can listen and speak at the same time using a full-duplex architecture. Complex questions get handed off to GPT-5.5 in the background, which drastically improves response quality. GPT-Live-1 is available now for paying ChatGPT users, with a mini version for free

items.title: Mistral enters robotics with Robostral Navigate, an 8B model that steers robots using just one camera
items.summary: Mistral is entering the robotics market with Robostral Navigate, an 8B model that guides robots through unknown environments using only a single RGB camera. Trained in simulation and refined with reinforcement learning (CISPO), it hits 76.6 percent on the R2R-CE benchmark. Mistra

items.title: Anthropic's fix for Fable 5's high cost is turning it into a manager that delegates to Sonnet 5
items.summary: Anthropic recommends using the expensive Claude Fable 5 mainly as a planner for smaller models instead of running it on every task. Combined with Sonnet 5 in the "Advisor" pattern, this setup hits 92 percent of Fable 5's solo performance at 63 percent of the cost. The article Ant

items.summary: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

items.title: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 dominates new industry benchmarks at a steep premium

items.title: Google Deepmind adds background execution and MCP support to Gemini API managed agents
items.summary: Google Deepmind is adding four new features to Managed Agents in the Gemini API. Agents can now run asynchronously in the background, connect directly to remote MCP servers, use custom functions alongside sandbox tools, and refresh credentials without losing state. The article Go
